ultimate.name: Gloompurge (Array Arcana: INT)
ultimate.description: Arcane creates a Gloompurger Array that immediately deals Nature DMG to enemies within the area of effect (AOE). When hitting an enemy within the Gloompurger Array with a Finisher or a Final Strike performed by the controlled operator, the Gloompurger Array unleashes a Cluster Strike that deals Area DMG to the said enemy, up to 2 times. After triggering Cluster Strike 2 times, the ultimate is switched to Gloompurge Arcana: deals Nature DMG to enemies within a large AOE. Array Arcana: INT — When created, the Gloompurger Array also forcibly applies Corrosion to enemies in the AOE.

WILL: when Gloompurger Array (sequence 1) and Gloompurge Arcana (sequence 2) deal DMG, they also apply [Will × 0.02%] Nature Susceptibility and Cryo Susceptibility (max 12.8%) for 10s; this effect cannot stack.
